review_summary.college_name: KMP College of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of its teachers, staff members, library facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Recently, there are no placements, but it will start soon. They are offering placements, and it is the first batch. Students wish for good placements in this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good in this college. Students have no proper facilities in the laboratory such as reagents, apparatus, etc. So due to this students are facing difficulty, especially during exam times. Equipment is also not working, but they are very accurate about fees, and they inform on time through circular about the fees. Sometimes they even add fines to students for silly reasons. Students have no proper management, if students are reaching them to tell this they would tell that it is the students' fault, and sometimes teachers have partiality in internal marks which is not good. Our hostel is about 20 minutes distance from our college. The hostel fee is high with low quality. In this case, students have no proper management. But nowadays, the quality of food is better. Students hope that daily menu food will become good quality without increasing fees.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not provided for students, but it is accessible by staff. Laboratories do not have proper chemicals which are needed. Library does not contain books that are needed for the course. Proper hostel is not provided for boys. Only girls' hostel is available in this college.

individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: The roles offered after graduation are a duty doctor in any hospital, pharmacist etc. You will get a chance to do research on tablets, to become a drug inspector, hospital pharmacist, and maintain your own pharmaceuticals. You can become the head of the drug information centre, and clinical pharmacist etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has excellent infrastructure, with required laboratories with well-equipped machines. A library and a chemical lab are available. There are Wi-Fi facilities and hostels for both girls and boys.
content.Faculty: We have good faculty, and they are PhD scholars. They are professional. The lecturers have 10 years of teaching experience in pharmacy. The lecturers are very friendly and kind towards the students. They are very good at teaching and clarifying the doubts of students without hesitating them.

review_summary.college_name: Minerva College of Education Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: They force you to pay for certain things; it does not matter to them if you are interested or not.

content.Placements: 30% of students are placed well, but the rest don't find college placement worthy, like me. They have big talks and little action. I will choose an off-campus interview over college placement. I suggest that you work hard and train yourself for the GPAT and other exams.
content.Infrastructure: The worst quality hostels are there; the classes are hot and humid, and they also don't compromise with students who want to wear lab coats in labs due to the high temperature. And also, they have only one class with five fans, which is only for fresher batches; other classes have two fans, which is good for us.

individual_reviews.title: The environment was satisfying for study.

content.Placements: 100% of students got placed in our course. The highest package was 97%, and the lowest and average packages were offered in our course. Top recruiting companies hired 95% of students who got internships from our course. The top roles offered in our course were also provided.
content.Infrastructure: The institute looked nice and was educational. The staff was very good. The quality of facilities in the hostel. The food available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities. Sports and games were all good. I suggested that everyone take admission.

individual_reviews.title: This college gives me wings.

content.Placements: There were total approximately 50 to 60% of students placed from our batch. The highest package offered 2.5 to 3.5 CTC. There were so many top hiring companies from Himachal Pradesh that were ready for hiring. Companies trust the teaching and knowledge of the students which gives chance to earn.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had very safe environment. Facilities provided by the hostel department were enough for any student. Hostel provided medical facilities. They tried to care for every student who lived in hostel so there was no chance that students would feel uncomfortable.
